target.title: perf(config): dedupe plugin auto-enable fanout work
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the plugin auto-enable recomputation side of #81355.

`applyPluginAutoEnable` can be called repeatedly during the same cold-start RPC fanout with the same runtime config and environment inputs. This adds a same-turn cache keyed by config, env, manifest registry, and discovery identity so identical fanout calls reuse the computed result instead of re-running detection/materialization.

The cache is cleared on the next event-loop turn so mutable inputs such as `process.env` and plugin discovery state are not held as long-lived stale keys.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/config/plugin-auto-enable.core.test.ts src/config/plugin-auto-enable.providers.test.ts src/config/plugin-auto-enable.channels.test.ts src/config/plugin-auto-enable.model-support.test.ts src/config/plugin-auto-enable.prefer-over.test.ts src/plugins/web-search-providers.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/config/plugin-auto-enable.apply.ts src/config/plugin-auto-enable.core.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

behavior: Repeated `applyPluginAutoEnable` calls with identical config/env inputs in the same event-loop turn reuse the same computed result, then recompute after the turn clears.

environment: Docker Node 22.19.0 on the OpenClaw source checkout.

steps:
1. Ran the focused regression before the fix and confirmed identical same-turn calls did not reuse the result.
2. Applied the same-turn cache.
3. Added freshness checks for same-object config/env mutations before the cache clear tick.
4. Re-ran the focused and broader plugin auto-enable suites plus adjacent web-search runtime tests.
5. Ran a source-level proof that invokes `applyPluginAutoEnable` twice in one turn, mutates config/env before the clear tick, waits one `setImmediate`, then invokes it again.

evidence:
```json
{
  "sameTurnReused": true,
  "configMutationRecomputed": true,
  "envMutationObserved": true,
  "nextTurnRecomputed": true
}
```

observedResult: Same-turn identical inputs reuse the cached result. Same-object config or env mutations before the clear tick recompute instead of returning stale auto-enable output. A later event-loop turn also recomputes.

notTested: I did not replay the full dashboard cold-start RPC fanout locally. This PR covers only the `applyPluginAutoEnable` recomputation part of #81355; the `tts.status` event-loop blocking part remains separate.
